title: Champagne of Beers
subtitle: A heartland country anthem for blue-collar Friday nights, neon-buzzing bars, and the gold-tinted bottle that ties them together.
cover_prompt: Hasselblad medium-format film photograph, late golden hour light streaming through a small-town American tavern window, single sweat-beaded amber-gold longneck beer bottle (clear glass, no label, no logos) standing on a worn dark-wood bar counter, soft bokeh of warm tungsten neon signs in the deep background, dust motes floating in the warm sunbeam, shallow depth of field, palette of caramel, gold, ochre, and deep mahogany brown, fine 35mm film grain, Americana editorial mood, no text, no logos, no faces, no watermarks, square format, high contrast for legibility under overlay text
